title: Initialize Repository
description: Create a new Git repository in the current directory.

title: Clone Repository
description: Clone a remote repository to your local machine.

title: Check Status
description: Display the state of the working directory and staging area.

title: Add File
description: Add a specific file to the staging area.

title: Add All Changes
description: Stage all modified and new files.

title: Commit Changes
description: Commit staged changes with a message.

title: View Commit History
description: Display commit history.

title: One Line Log
description: Show compact commit history.

title: Create Branch
description: Create a new branch.

title: List Branches
description: Show all local branches.

title: Switch Branch
description: Switch to another branch.

title: Create and Switch Branch
description: Create and switch to a new branch.

title: Switch Branch (Modern)
description: Switch to an existing branch.

title: Merge Branch
description: Merge a branch into the current branch.

title: Delete Branch
description: Delete a local branch.

title: Add Remote
description: Connect a local repository to a remote repository.

title: View Remotes
description: Show configured remote repositories.

title: Push Branch
description: Push local commits to remote repository.

title: Pull Changes
description: Fetch and merge changes from remote repository.

title: Fetch Changes
description: Download objects and refs from remote repository.

title: Show Differences
description: Display file changes not yet staged.

title: View Staged Differences
description: Show staged changes before commit.

title: Undo Last Commit
description: Undo the last commit while keeping changes staged.

title: Discard Changes
description: Discard changes made to a file.

title: Restore Staged File
description: Unstage a file while keeping modifications.

title: Stash Changes
description: Temporarily save uncommitted changes.

title: Apply Stash
description: Apply the most recent stash.

title: List Stashes
description: Show all saved stashes.

title: Cherry Pick Commit
description: Apply a specific commit from another branch.

title: Interactive Rebase
description: Rewrite and clean up commit history.

title: Show Reflog
description: View reference log and recover lost commits.

title: Search Commit
description: Search commit messages.

title: Clean Untracked Files
description: Remove untracked files and directories.
